news.headline: US picks potential partners for using Cold War-era plutonium as fuel
news.summary: Trump gov't plans to make about 20 tonnes of plutonium from dismantled nuclear warheads available to US power firms.

news.headline: Trump-led push to redraw Congress maps faces setbacks in Southern states
news.summary: State lawmakers reject a new map in South Carolina as judges strike down newly drawn US House districts one in Alabama.

news.headline: The Wars in Ukraine and Iran Are More Alike Than You May Think
news.summary: Aspects such as drone technology and diplomacy show how the wars intersect on the battlefield and in global alignments, providing a model for future conflicts.
